name: Workflow 1 - Guardrailed Hybrid AI Security Gate (Qwen)

parameters.jsCode:
const findings = Array.isArray($json.findings) ? $json.findings : [];
const counts = $json.severity_counts || {};
const ai = $json.ai_assessment || {};

const severity =
  (counts.critical || 0) > 0 ? "critical" :
  (counts.high || 0) > 0 ? "high" :
  (counts.medium || 0) > 0 ? "medium" :
  (counts.low || 0) > 0 ? "low" :
  "info";

return [{
  json: {
    report_type: "AI-Assisted DevSecOps Security Report",
    project_name: $json.metadata?.repo || "unknown-project",
    repo: $json.metadata?.repo || "",
    branch: $json.metadata?.branch || "",
    commit: $json.metadata?.commit || "",

    total_findings: $json.total_findings || findings.length,
    risk_score: $json.final_risk_score || 0,
    pre_risk_score: $json.pre_risk_score || 0,
    severity,

    analysis_type: "guardrailed_hybrid_ai_security_gate",
    deterministic_decision: $json.deterministic_decision,
    deterministic_block_reasons: $json.deterministic_block_reasons || [],
    gate_reasons: $json.final_gate_reasons || [],
    decision_source: $json.decision_source,

    ai_gate_enabled: $json.ai_gate_enabled,
    ai_status: $json.ai_status,
    ai_schema_valid: $json.ai_schema_valid,
    ai_validation_errors: $json.ai_validation_errors || [],
    ai_provider: $json.ai_provider,
    ai_model: $json.ai_model,
    ai_latency_ms: $json.ai_latency_ms || 0,
    ai_confidence_threshold: $json.ai_confidence_threshold,
    ai_risk_score: ai.ai_risk_score ?? null,
    ai_severity: ai.ai_severity || "",
    ai_confidence: ai.ai_confidence ?? null,
    ai_recommended_decision: ai.ai_recommended_decision || "",
    ai_summary: ai.ai_summary || `AI gate status: ${$json.ai_status}`,
    ai_fix_suggestion: ai.remediation_summary || "",
    ai_priority_findings: ai.priority_findings || [],
    ai_block_reasons: ai.ai_block_reasons || [],
    ai_gate_input: $json.ai_gate_input || {},
    ai_raw_response: $json.ai_raw_response || "",

    should_block_pipeline: $json.should_block_pipeline === true,
    pipeline_decision: $json.pipeline_decision,

    severity_counts: counts,
    tool_counts: $json.tool_counts || {},
    ai_findings: [],
    normal_findings: findings,
    all_findings: findings
  }
}];

const gate = $("Format Report for Dashboard").first().json;
const dbResponse = $json || {};

return [{
  json: {
    pipeline_decision: gate.pipeline_decision,
    should_block_pipeline: gate.should_block_pipeline,
    risk_score: gate.risk_score,
    pre_risk_score: gate.pre_risk_score,
    severity: gate.severity,
    severity_counts: gate.severity_counts,
    total_findings: gate.total_findings,

    deterministic_decision: gate.deterministic_decision,
    ai_status: gate.ai_status,
    ai_schema_valid: gate.ai_schema_valid,
    ai_provider: gate.ai_provider,
    ai_model: gate.ai_model,
    ai_risk_score: gate.ai_risk_score,
    ai_severity: gate.ai_severity,
    ai_confidence: gate.ai_confidence,
    ai_recommended_decision: gate.ai_recommended_decision,
    ai_latency_ms: gate.ai_latency_ms,
    decision_source: gate.decision_source,
    gate_reasons: gate.gate_reasons,

    message: gate.pipeline_decision === "BLOCK"
      ? "Hybrid AI security gate blocked the pipeline. CD deployment stopped."
      : "Hybrid AI security gate passed. CD deployment allowed.",
    dashboard_saved: true,
    scan_id: dbResponse.id || dbResponse.scan_id || null
  }
}];
